case_title: EBONY G FLOURNEY VS. COMERICA BANK

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-28-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-28-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT BY COURT CALL. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY JASON MARKUS--DIRECTOR OF FRAUD UNIT (XEROX BUSINESS). NO COSTS, IFP FILED BY PLAINTIFF. DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-28-2015 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FLOURNEY, EBONY G IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT COMERICA BANK STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO DEFENDANT RETURNED = RETURN TO SENDER, INSUFFICIENT ADDRESS, UNABLE TO FORWARD
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED AUG-03-2015 ORDERED DESTROYED
